description: A Department of Labor slogan graphic. The image is a warm, faded, vintage-toned (sepia color-graded) photograph of a 1956 Chevrolet Bel Air two-tone turquoise-and-white car parked in the driveway of a two-story brick suburban house with a green lawn, shade trees, and power lines overhead. Overlaid in the center is a small white DOL eagle emblem and a large white flowing script reading 'Recapture the Dream'.
